ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "quant_saved" REAL /* Amount of financial assistance received */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Gender of the beneficiary (1 for female, 0 for male) */,
  "highschool_completed" INTEGER /* Indicator if the beneficiary has completed high school (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "rem_any" INTEGER /* Indicator if the beneficiary has any remaining debt (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "wealthy" INTEGER /* Indicator if the beneficiary is classified as wealthy (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the beneficiary */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the beneficiary */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the beneficiary */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the beneficiary */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the beneficiary */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, student) */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the beneficiary */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the beneficiary's household */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed (e.g., high school, college, graduate) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the beneficiary */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Indicator if the beneficiary has a disability (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistance_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistance program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "max_assistance" REAL /* Maximum amount of assistance that can be provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "application_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for applying to the program */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for program inquiries */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for program inquiries */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary applying for assistance */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program for which the application is submitted */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "application_reason" TEXT /* Reason for applying for the assistance */,
  "application_amount" REAL /* Amount of assistance requested */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved (if approved) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES assistance_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source (e.g., donor, organization) */,
  "amount_contributed" REAL /* Total amount contributed by the funding source */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding contribution */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding contribution */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the funding source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beneficiary receiving assistance */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount disbursed to the beneficiary */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the disbursement was made */,
  "disbursement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disbursement */,
  "disbursement_method" TEXT /* Method of disbursement (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disbursements_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program associated with the impact report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "outcomes" TEXT /* Summary of outcomes from the assistance program */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of impact report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the author who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_reports_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES assistance_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coordinator, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for user communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of residence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
